subcodes.first_line: O beloved! On this day the Greater Branch attained unto the presence and presented thy letter before the Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عزیز در این یوم غصن اکبر بحضور فائز و نامه شما را تلقاء وجه عرض نمود
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
